WhyItMatters: Combines sign-in behavior, identity risk, device trust, rare locations, and authentication failures into one identity-focused review path.
ReviewSteps: Review all sign-in activity for the target user.
Validate failed or interrupted authentication patterns.
Check identity risk, device trust, and Conditional Access outcomes.
Review rare country/location activity compared to the user baseline.
Pivot to cloud activity and endpoint activity immediately after suspicious successful sign-ins.
ExpectedResults: Rows may show failed sign-ins, risky sign-ins, unmanaged device use, rare locations, or identity-provider activity requiring validation.
NoResultsMeaning: No identity/authentication telemetry was returned or the relevant table is unavailable for the selected window.
RecommendedActions: Review Conditional Access and session controls.
Review MFA method strength and user risk policy response.
Document identity telemetry gaps if tables are unavailable.
